description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden storage crate with reinforced edges and visible metal fasteners at the corners. The box is constructed from thick, weathered wooden planks and features two parallel wooden slats running lengthwise on the top and bottom for added structural support. Stenciled black military-style markings are visible on the sides and top, indicating it is designed to store 3.5-inch M28A2 rockets, with additional lot and weight information. The crate appears to be tightly sealed, with no visible handles or external locking mechanisms, and the lid is likely secured by nails or screws. The overall finish is matte and slightly rough, with a natural wood grain and some signs of wear. This type of storage box is typically used for heavy-duty storage or transport in industrial, military, or urban utility settings.
description: A large, reinforced wooden crate with military-style stenciled markings and a matte, weathered finish. It is designed for secure storage and transport of heavy or sensitive items.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow end of the crate with visible wood grain, metal fasteners, and a slightly recessed panel.
description_view_1: Side view displays the full length of the crate, stenciled labeling, and two reinforcing slats on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite narrow end with similar construction details and no visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the plain wooden surface with reinforcing slats but no visible labeling or markings.
